flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at West Virginia Junior College-Charleston fell 17% between 2006 and 2009 (61.5% → 51.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at West Virginia Junior College-Charleston rose 87% between 2021 and 2024 (211 → 394).
